title: GATE-2-PREP minimal loop
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-2-PREP':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
        task['started_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:25:00Z'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:25:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
runner = Path('governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py')
runner.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
lines = [
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'"""Gate 2 deterministic minimal governance loop runner."""',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'TRACE_ID = "gate2_minimal_loop_trace_v1"',
'REQUIRED_FILES = [',
'    "governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json",',
'    "governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json",',
'    "governance/state/kz2_ssot_status.json",',
'    "governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json",',
']',
'',
'def collect_state():',
'    checks = []',
'    all_present = True',
'    for item in REQUIRED_FILES:',
'        path = Path(item)',
'        exists = path.exists()',
'        size = len(path.read_bytes()) if exists else 0',
'        valid = exists and size > 2',
'        if not valid:',
'            all_present = False',
'        checks.append({"path": item, "exists": exists, "bytes": size, "valid": valid})',
'    return {',
'        "trace_id": TRACE_ID,',
'        "status": "PASS" if all_present else "BLOCKED",',
'        "release_pass": False,',
'        "deterministic": True,',
'        "checks": checks,',
'    }',
'',
'def main():',
'    result = collect_state()',
'    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))',
'    return 0 if result["status"] == "PASS" else 1',
'',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    raise SystemExit(main())',
]
runner.write_text(NL.join(lines) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(runner))
text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
parsed = True
try:
    compile(text, str(runner), 'exec')
except:
    parsed = False
status_obj = {'status':'PASS' if parsed and len(runner.read_bytes()) > 50 else 'BLOCKED','all_valid': parsed and len(runner.read_bytes()) > 50,'runner':str(runner),'bytes':len(runner.read_bytes()),'ast_parse':parsed,'trace_id':'gate2_minimal_loop_trace_v1','workflow_files_touched':False}
status_path = Path('governance/state/gate2_minimal_loop_runner_status.json')
status_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status_path.write_text(json.dumps(status_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(status_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE2_PREP_MINIMAL_LOOP_RUNNER.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-2-PREP','trace_id':'gate2_prep_minimal_loop_runner','status':'completed' if status_obj['all_valid'] else 'blocked','release_pass':False,'runner':str(runner),'runner_status':str(status_path),'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'GATE-2-PREP-RECORD record result and activate next queue task'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE2_PREP_MINIMAL_LOOP_RUNNER.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-2-PREP | Minimal governance loop runner' + NL + 'Status: ' + ('completed' if status_obj['all_valid'] else 'blocked') + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'Created deterministic runner governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py with trace_id gate2_minimal_loop_trace_v1. Runner is >50 bytes and compile/ast-parse clean.' + NL + NL + 'Status proof: governance/state/gate2_minimal_loop_runner_status.json' + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL + NL + 'Next: record result and activate next queue task.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
